login.title: Welcome back!
login.description: Log in to FlavorFit and continue your healthy adventure!

register.title: Welcome!
register.description: Sign up for FlavorFit and start your healthy eating journey!
register.footer: Already have an account? <important>Log in now!</important>

verify.title: Email confirmation
verify.description: Check your email and enter the confirmation code.
verify.label: Enter the 6-digit code that was sent to your email.
verify.wait: You can request the code again in - {secondsLeft} seconds.

reset.title: Password recovery
reset.description: Enter your email to recover your password
reset.footer: Already have an account? <important>Log in now!</important>

new-password.title: Creating a new password
new-password.description: Create a new password to log in to the system
new-password.footer: Already have an account? <important>Log in now!</important>

new-password.title: Создание нового пароля
new-password.description: Создайте новый пароль для входа в систему.
